Mohammed bin Rashid issues a law establishing the Dubai Longevity Authority Sheikh Hamdan bin Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum President of the Dubai Longevity Authority Helal Saeed Almarri Director General of the Dubai Department of Economy and Tourism Chairman of the Dubai Longevity Authority Dubai Longevity Authority - Aims to develop Dubai as the world's leading hub for regulated longevity, wellness and advanced healthcare offerings and create paths for investment flows in this vital sector. - Supports the objectives of the Dubai Economic Agenda, D33, and the Dubai Social Agenda 33, which seek to position Dubai among the world's top three cities for quality of life.

Legendary Spanish footballer and former FC Barcelona star Andres Iniesta announces the launch of the Iniesta Academy in Dubai, in partnership with local partner Abdulrahman Almeqbali and in cooperation with the Dubai Sports Council (DSC), in a move aimed at identifying and developing local football talent while nurturing players through Iniesta's world-class training methodology. The academy will also hold open trials at Dubai Sports World from 1 to 14 August 2026 to select players wishing to join the academy, ahead of the opening of multiple locations across different areas of Dubai. @andresiniesta8 I @DubaiSC
